notecards.title: Cadence compression
notecards.payload: Product release cadence is compressing across teams.
notecards.why_it_matters: Execution pace is now a strategic moat.

notecards.title: Hiring signal
notecards.payload: Hiring posts correlate with launch windows.
notecards.why_it_matters: Operational signals can front-run roadmap shifts.

highlights.title: Cadence increase
highlights.summary: Multiple teams moved from quarterly to monthly pushes.

stories.title: Release Cadence Shift
stories.what_happened: Release cycles are shortening with tighter feedback loops.
stories.why_it_matters: Strategy and operations need faster planning intervals.

connections.insight: Hiring and launch rhythm are increasingly synchronized.
